captured_from: pre-fix source inspection plus user-reported rendered plan evidence
note: Local browser execution was unavailable in this Codex runtime because the bundled Playwright package is missing playwright-core. This trace records the failing decision path found before behavior changes were applied.

client_inputs.fat_target: high-calorie target with remaining fat exchanges after meal selection

targets.approved_cap_observed_in_source: fatPerMealMax: 6 by default, lower in selected condition overrides

exchanges.pre_fix: Remaining fat exchanges could be pushed into lunch/dinner visible-oil portions even when a meal had already reached the cap.
exchanges.expected: Visible oil never exceeds the active fatPerMealMax cap.

pre_fix: allocateFatRemaining assigned all remaining fat to the first available main slot even after cap overflow.
calcDayTotalsForPlan used a calorie-gap while loop that added 1 tsp oil repeatedly without checking fatPerMealMax.
calcDayTotalsForPlanDisplay strict fallback also increased lunch/dinner fat to close target gaps.
expected: Add visible oil only while the selected meal is below fatPerMealMax.
Prefer compatible redistribution/whole-food fat guidance when oil cap is reached.
Report unresolved calorie gaps rather than hiding them with excessive oil.

rendered_portions.pre_fix: High-oil quantities reached weekly rendered tables and printed reports.
rendered_portions.expected: Rendered visible oil amount is capped and warnings explain any remaining gap.

calculated_totals.pre_fix: Calories could match the target only because unrealistic oil quantities were injected.
calculated_totals.expected: Plan Quality totals equal rendered meal-instance totals, but cannot be made acceptable by exceeding the cap.

expected: Fat target exceeds the per-meal cap.
Calorie target remains below target after realistic visible-oil allocation.
Use whole-food fats/snack choices or revise exchanges.
